title: Beginnings And Endings.
content:
Paul, he began ill, but he ended well;
    Judas began well, but he foully fell:
    In godliness not the beginnings so
    Much as the ends are to be look'd unto.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Beginnings And Endings."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
